title: Samsung just revealed more details about its upcoming smart glasses, including battery life - Engadget
summary: Meta does something similar with its smart glasses, but this led to companies offering "hacking" services that allows smart glass perverts to do their thing without any LED light. We do know, however, what they'll look like.
